steps.title: Identify the three-part structure
steps.content: The text follows a clear pattern: it opens with a concrete example of shoreline hardening (Adelaide), explains how researchers studied its ecological effects (their methodology using a bird survey tool), then states the finding.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content: B identifies this pattern: example, methodology, and finding. A, C, and D mischaracterize it—treating the elements as evidence for a hypothesis, as speculation from observations, or as a significance discussion. That matches choice B—B is correct.
